headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks look to close out Cavs, Spurs keep series alive
headlines.description: The Knicks are one win away from a trip to the NBA Finals, where they have the second-shortest title odds.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Jalen Brunson is the greatest Knick ever if they win the championship
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith gives his thoughts on whether Jalen Brunson will be the greatest Knick ever if they win the championship.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: From breaking news to the latest intel from around the NBA, here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast.

headlines.headline: Why Stephen A. considers Kenny Atkinson's analytics comment egregious
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to Cavaliers coach Kenny Atkinson's analytics comment that Cleveland has won two out of three games vs. the Knicks.

headlines.headline: Sources: Lakers hire Rohan Ramadas as assistant general manager
headlines.description: The Lakers made their first significant move of the offseason by hiring Rohan Ramadas as an assistant GM under president and GM Rob Pelinka, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Thunder-Spurs is a pick 'em series at this point
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith takes stock of the Thunder-Spurs series after San Antonio won Game 4 to tie it at 2-2.

headlines.headline: Titans say OSU's Carnell Tate was perfect fit for Cam Ward
headlines.description: With premium defensive options on the board, Tennessee made unanimous decision to get an impact player on offense.

headlines.headline: Field Yates' fantasy football PPR rankings: Top 160 for 2026
headlines.description: Field provides his latest rankings for the upcoming season, which will be updated throughout the offseason.

headlines.headline: 'I Scored a Touchdown': Antwaan Randle El to Hines Ward 'special'
headlines.description: The Steelers teammates share with ESPN the details of the TD -- and the celebration -- from Super Bowl XL.

headlines.headline: Answering five questions ahead of OTAs for the Jets
headlines.description: Looking at some of the biggest storylines as New York starts its organized team activities Wednesday.

headlines.headline: Will Pats QB Drake Maye improve in second year with McDaniels?
headlines.description: The New England quarterback is entering a vital second season with his offensive coordinator.

headlines.headline: Johnny Manziel dominates in MMA debut, says he won't fight again
headlines.description: Former NFL quarterback Johnny Manziel flashed some skills as a fighter in his MMA debut, stopping social media influencer Bob Menery in the first round before saying one fight was "good enough."

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Avalanche fall to last on the odds board, Canes remain favorites
headlines.description: The Hurricanes remain the Stanley Cup favorites, with the Golden Knights just behind on the odds board.

headlines.headline: Maple Leafs' Domi out indefinitely due to surgery complications
headlines.description: Maple Leafs forward Max Domi is out indefinitely after complications arose during an offseason surgery.

headlines.headline: Kevin Weekes: The Golden Knights bend but don't break
headlines.description: Kevin Weekes explains how the Golden Knights came back from a three-goal deficit and what John Tortorella has brought to the team.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: Monday's game is a pivot point in the Eastern Conference finals. Plus, highlights from Avs-Knights Game 3 and updated playoff stats.

headlines.headline: Vegas takes 3-0 lead into game 4 against Colorado
headlines.description: Colorado Avalanche (55-16-11, in the Central Division) vs. Vegas Golden Knights (39-26-17, in the Pacific Division)

headlines.headline: Mark Stone scores in return as Vegas Golden Knights rally
headlines.description: Vegas Golden Knights captain Mark Stone, who had missed the past five games with a lower-body injury, not only played in Sunday's 5-3 victory over the Colorado Avalanche, his goal sparked a comeback that gave his club a 3-0 series lead in the West finals.
